## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Related issues
- Resolves: #
- Related: #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Feature / content update
- [ ] Style / theme
- [ ] Chore / refactor

## Validation
- [ ] Tested in both light and dark mode
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
